introSection: Rock & Roller Coaster is a travelling steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf currently owned by German showman Vorlop.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was first known as Super 8 Bahn. It had red track and white supports.

At some point after 1993, it was renamed Die Wilden 50er and repainted red with yellow supports.

Between 2006 and 2012, the name was changed again to the current name.

fullText:
Rock & Roller Coaster is a travelling steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf currently owned by German showman Vorlop.

The ride was first known as Super 8 Bahn. It had red track and white supports.

At some point after 1993, it was renamed Die Wilden 50er and repainted red with yellow supports.

Between 2006 and 2012, the name was changed again to the current name.
